nodes.context: Assyrian criminal organization active in southwestern Sydney, involved in drug trafficking, murders, and shootings.
Predecessor gang to DLASTHR, active in Sydney's western suburbs in the 1990s, implicated in the murder of police officer David Carty.
Breakaway group from DLASTHR, rival in drug turf wars in Sydney's western suburbs.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; ex-member Adrian Buxton was murdered, possibly by DLASTHR.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; member Alen Moradian was murdered, and Luke Sparos was charged with the murder.
Rival gang to DLASTHR mentioned in the infobox.

edges.context: DLASTHR originated from the Assyrian Kings, resurrecting the gang under a new banner in the early 2000s.
Conflict over drug supply led to drive-by shootings and firebombings in the 2010s.
DLASTHR is suspected of murdering ex-Nomads member Adrian Buxton.
Luke Sparos, charged with attempted murder of DLASTHR member Samer Marcus, was also charged with murder of Comanchero member Alen Moradian.
Bronx Boys are listed as rivals in the infobox.
